title: 基于两个动态参数的自主移动机器人相位稳定调节器
summary: Autonomous mobile robots, or AMRs, can benefit from a phase regulator with two real-time signals, according to a researcher. The post Phase stability regulator based on two dynamic parameters for autonomous mobile robots appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Phase stability regulator based on two dynamic parameters for autonomous mobile robots）

title: 由于劳动力短缺，日本航空开始在东京羽田机场进行人形机器人试验
summary: Tokyo's Haneda Airport is beginning a trial of humanoid robots in airport ground services amid chronic labor challenges and a rapidly ageing workforce.（原题：Japan Airlines begins humanoid robot trials at Tokyo's Haneda airport as labor shortages bite）
